EntityCommonStockSharesOutstanding.label: Entity Common Stock, Shares Outstanding
EntityCommonStockSharesOutstanding.description: Indicate number of shares or other units outstanding of each of registrant's classes of capital or common stock or other ownership interests.

Revenues.label: Revenues
Revenues.description: Amount of revenue recognized from goods sold, services rendered, insurance premiums, or other activities that constitute an earning process.

CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue.label: Cash and Cash Equivalents, at Carrying Value
CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue.description: Amount of currency on hand as well as demand deposits with banks or financial institutions.

LongTermDebtNoncurrent.label: Long-Term Debt, Excluding Current Maturities
LongTermDebtNoncurrent.description: Amount of long-term debt, excluding current portion.

DebtCurrent.label: Debt, Current
DebtCurrent.description: Amount of debt classified as current, due within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer.

WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOuts.label: Weighted Average Number of Diluted Shares Outstanding
WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOuts.description: The average number of shares issued and outstanding that are used in calculating diluted EPS, determined based on the timing of issuance of shares in the period.
